positive: Mid-century modern geometric pattern featuring interlocking abstract shapes, stylized sunbursts, and wavy lines. Color palette limited to mustard yellow, burnt orange, teal, and cream. Clean vector art style, perfect tiling pattern, symmetrical arrangement, graphic design, retro aesthetic.
